modeling_constraints: Preserve channel polarity, unity gain, and continuous pass-through behavior.
Do not add delay, gain control, rail clipping, retained state, current contributions, or validation-only hooks.

properties.observable_contract: VOUTP continuously follows VINP with unity voltage gain and unchanged polarity.
VOUTN continuously follows VINN with unity voltage gain and unchanged polarity.
Each output depends on its corresponding input and is not cross-coupled to the opposite input.
The differential output VOUTP minus VOUTN equals the differential input VINP minus VINN.
The output pair preserves the input pair common-mode voltage without conversion or rail logic.

title: Differential Buffer
